question: Dota 2: Tundra Esports vs Heroic - Game 2 Winner
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Tundra Esports and Heroic in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 8 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Tundra Esports" if Tundra Esports win Game 2 against Heroic.

This market will resolve to "Heroic" if Heroic win Game 2 against Tundra Esports.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 2 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 2. 

If Game 2 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

This market refers on the tennis match between Tereza Valentova and Ella Seidel in the Qatar Total Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 7 at 4:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Valentova' if Tereza Valentova advances against Ella Seidel.

This market will resolve to 'Seidel' if Ella Seidel advances against Tereza Valentova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the price of Ethereum be less than $1,600 on February 13?
description:
This market will resolve according to the final "Close" price of the Binance 1 minute candle for ETH/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) on the date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Qatar Total Open, Qualification: Storm Hunter vs Camila Osorio
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Storm Hunter and Camila Osorio in the Qatar Total Open, Qualification, scheduled for February 7 at 5:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hunter' if Storm Hunter advances against Camila Osorio.

This market will resolve to 'Osorio' if Camila Osorio advances against Storm Hunter.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Qatar Total Open: Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova vs Elise Mertens
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova and Elise Mertens in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Pavlyuchenkova' if Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova advances against Elise Mertens.

This market will resolve to 'Mertens' if Elise Mertens advances against Anastasia Pavlyuchenkova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the total number of TSA passengers for February 13 be less than 1,600,000?
description:
This market will resolve to the total number of TSA passengers reported on February 13, 2026. 

If the reported total number of TSA passengers falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

This market will resolve as soon as throughput data becomes available for the listed date. Any revisions published to data for dates December 1, 2025 and onward prior to the release of data for all dates within the listed range will be considered.

If data is not available for the listed date by March 31, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be the daily checkpoint throughputs as measured by the US Transportation Security Administration (TSA), https://www.tsa.gov/travel/passenger-volumes. Should this URL change or move locations, a new URL on the tsa.gov domain will remain valid to resolve this market.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 50.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 51 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Ethereum price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the ETH/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/eth-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream ETH/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will Lady Gaga perform during the Super Bowl LX halftime show?
description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Lady Gaga performs live and in person during the Super Bowl LX halftime show currently scheduled for February 8, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

If this event is cancelled or otherwise delayed beyond March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

The primary resolution source for this market will be footage of the Super Bowl LX halftime show, however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.
groupItemTitle: Lady Gaga

events.title: Who will perform at 2026 Big Game halftime show?
events.description: This is a market on predicting the performers for the Super Bowl LX halftime show.

question: Game Handicap: GL (-1.5) vs MOUZ (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion wins 2 or more games than MOUZ in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "MOUZ".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Game Handicap: GL (-1.5) vs MOUZ (+1.5)

This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against GamerLegion.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

description:
In the upcoming match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 39 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

question: Will the total number of TSA passengers for February 9 - 15 be less than 14,000,000?
description:
This market will resolve to the total number of TSA passengers reported between February 9, 2026 and February 15, 2026 (inclusive). 

The total number of TSA passengers will be calculated by summing all of the TSA daily checkpoint throughputs reported for this date range (e.g. if there were a daily TSA checkpoint throughput of 2 million reported on December 1 and a daily TSA checkpoint throughput of 3 million reported on December 2, the total number of TSA passengers for December 1-2 would be 5 million).

If the reported total number of TSA passengers falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

This market will resolve as soon as throughput data becomes available for all dates within the listed range. Any revisions published to data for dates December 8, 2025 and onward prior to the release of data for all dates within the listed range will be considered.

If data is not available for any of the dates from February 9, 2026 to February 15, 2026 by March 31, 2026, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be the daily checkpoint throughputs as measured by the US Transportation Security Administration (TSA), https://www.tsa.gov/travel/passenger-volumes. Should this URL change or move locations, a new URL on the tsa.gov domain will remain valid to resolve this market.

The resolution source for this market will be the daily checkpoint throughputs as measured by the US Transportation Security Administration (TSA), https://www.tsa.gov/travel/passenger-volumes. question: Set 1 Winner: Kalinskaya vs Maneiro
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Anna Kalinskaya and Jessica Bouzas Maneiro in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to “Kalinskaya” if Anna Kalinskaya wins the first set. It will resolve to “Maneiro” if Jessica Bouzas Maneiro wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA match statistics.
groupItemTitle: Qatar Total Open: Anna Kalinskaya vs Jessica Bouzas Maneiro Set 1 Winner

events.title: Qatar Total Open: Anna Kalinskaya vs Jessica Bouzas Maneiro
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Anna Kalinskaya and Jessica Bouzas Maneiro in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Kalinskaya' if Anna Kalinskaya advances against Jessica Bouzas Maneiro.

This market will resolve to 'Maneiro' if Jessica Bouzas Maneiro advances against Anna Kalinskaya.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: XRP Up or Down - February 8, 1PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Dayana Yastremska and Cristina Bucsa in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Yastremska' if Dayana Yastremska advances against Cristina Bucsa.

This market will resolve to 'Bucsa' if Cristina Bucsa advances against Dayana Yastremska.

This market refers on the tennis match between McCartney Kessler and Elsa Jacquemot in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Kessler' if McCartney Kessler advances against Elsa Jacquemot.

This market will resolve to 'Jacquemot' if Elsa Jacquemot advances against McCartney Kessler.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Siniakova vs. Tauson: Match O/U 21.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Katerina Siniakova and Clara Tauson in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.

This market refers on the tennis match between Ann Li and Leylah Fernandez in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Li' if Ann Li advances against Leylah Fernandez.

This market will resolve to 'Fernandez' if Leylah Fernandez advances against Ann Li.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set 1 Winner: Li vs Fernandez
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Ann Li and Leylah Fernandez in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to “Li” if Ann Li wins the first set. It will resolve to “Fernandez” if Leylah Fernandez wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA match statistics.

This market refers on the tennis match between Jaqueline Cristian and Karolina Muchova in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 at 2:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Cristian' if Jaqueline Cristian advances against Karolina Muchova.

This market will resolve to 'Muchova' if Karolina Muchova advances against Jaqueline Cristian.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Set Handicap: Muchova (-1.5) vs Cristian (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Karolina Muchova and Jaqueline Cristian in the Qatar Total Open, scheduled for February 8 2026.
This market will resolve to "Muchova" if Karolina Muchova wins by 2 or more sets than Jaqueline Cristian, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Cristian."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.

question: Will "Stray Kids: The dominATE Experience" Opening Weekend Box Office be less than 1.75m?
description:
This market will resolve according to how much "Stray Kids: The dominATE Experience" Opening Weekend Box Office will gross domestically on its opening weekend. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on this movie's The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend (February 6 - February 8) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by February 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

question: Solana Up or Down - February 8, 2PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against GamerLegion.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Will Trump say "Make America Great Again" this week? (February 15)
description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between February 9, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and February 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Pluralization/possessive of the word will count toward the resolution of this market.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.
groupItemTitle: Make America Great Again

question: Total Kills Over/Under 60.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 61 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.
groupItemTitle: Total Kills Over/Under 60.5 in Game 2?

events.title: Dota 2: GamerLegion vs MOUZ (BO3) - BLAST Slam Play-In
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between GamerLegion and MOUZ in the BLAST Slam Play-In, scheduled for February 6 at 12:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "GamerLegion" if GamerLegion win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against GamerLegion.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.liquipedia.net/dota2/Main_Page.

question: Will "Yeah" be said 100+ times during the first episode of the Joe Rogan Experience this week? (February 15)
description:
The Joe Rogan Experience podcast releases episodes on https://www.youtube.com/@joerogan.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed term is mentioned by anyone during the first released episode of the Joe Rogan Experience Podcast between February 9, 2026 and February 15, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

If clips of old episodes or prerecorded clips are aired where people are speaking, those clips will count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will count toward this market's resolution.

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

If no such episode of the Joe Rogan Experience Podcast is aired by February 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

JRE MMA Show episodes will not count for this market, only Joe Rogan Experience episodes.

The resolution source will be the released episode from (https://www.youtube.com/@joerogan).

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

If no such episode of the Joe Rogan Experience Podcast is aired by February 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

JRE MMA Show episodes will not count for this market, only Joe Rogan Experience episodes.

The resolution source will be the released episode from (https://www.youtube.com/@joerogan).

question: XRP Up or Down - February 7, 2:15PM-2:30PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
